---
title: "Retail Sales Index Statistical Summary"
subtitle: "Automated report from the ONS API"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd

clean = pd.read_csv("../data/processed/retail_sales_index_clean.csv", parse_dates=["period"])
summary = pd.read_csv("../outputs/tables/headline_summary.csv").iloc[0]
```

## Headline

The latest available Retail Sales Index value for **`{python} summary['latest_period']`** was **`{python} summary['latest_value']`** on a 2019 = 100 basis.

Compared with **`{python} summary['previous_period']`**, the index **`{python} summary['direction']`** by **`{python} summary['month_on_month_change']` index points**. Compared with the same month one year earlier, the index changed by **`{python} summary['year_on_year_change']` index points**.

## Trend

![Retail Sales Index trend](../outputs/figures/retail_sales_index_trend.png){fig-alt="Line chart showing the Retail Sales Index over the latest five years."}

## Key Statistics

```{python}
display_cols = [
    "latest_period",
    "latest_value",
    "month_on_month_change",
    "year_on_year_change",
    "observations",
]
pd.DataFrame([summary[display_cols]]).rename(
    columns={
        "latest_period": "Latest period",
        "latest_value": "Index value",
        "month_on_month_change": "Monthly change",
        "year_on_year_change": "Annual change",
        "observations": "Observations",
    }
)
```

## Source And Method

This report is generated by a reproducible analytical pipeline using the public ONS API.

- Dataset: `{python} summary['dataset_title']`
- ONS dataset version: `{python} summary['dataset_version']`
- Release date: `{python} summary['release_date']`
- Data retrieved: `{python} summary['retrieved_at_utc']`
- Source CSV: `{python} summary['source_url']`

The pipeline downloads the raw CSV, filters to the headline Great Britain all-retailing volume series, calculates change over time, produces a chart, and renders this statistical summary.

## Reproducibility Statement

The report can be regenerated after the next ONS monthly release with:

```bash
make report
```

The source code is structured for version control. Raw data, processed data, figures, and reports are generated outputs and are excluded from git because they can be recreated from the pipeline.
